title: Ch'ord Sy'fon
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Chord_Syfon.png]] |name=Ch'ord Sy'fon |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]][[Republic 78|''Republic'' 78]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You try my patience, Bothan.''"
"''He will be here, Lord Vader! I'm certain of it! Just… minutes…?|Darth Vader and Ch'ord Sy'fon|}} '''Ch'ord Sy'fon''' was a [[Color/Legends|brown]]-skinned [[Bothan]] [[Gender|male]] with light brown [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] who wore a light brown tunic with a collar. Around [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],[[Republic 78|''Republic'' 78]] states that it occurs [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], which ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' dates to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. Therefore, the events of ''Republic'' 78 must take place around 19 BBY he encountered the former [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guard]] [[Sagoro Autem]], who considered Sy'fon a friend, in a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. While the Bothan spoke with a group of [[Alien/Legends|aliens]], Autem approached him, asking for passage off-world as a favor Sy'fon owed him. The Bothan then granted the Human passage aboard the [[AA-9 Coruscant freighter/Legends|AA-9 Coruscant freighter]] ''[[Scimitar of Kelso]]'' to the planet [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], and Autem departed. [[Standard minute/Legends|Minutes]] before the ''Scimitar of Kelsa'' left, Sy'fon met with the [[Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], and told him that Autem would be trying to leave aboard the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] soon. However, before the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] could capture the Human, Autem sneaked aboard the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] his "friend" had provided him and escaped. ==Behind the scenes== Ch'ord Sy'fon appeared in the [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse comic book]] [[Republic 78|''Republic'' 78]], the seventy–eight issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' comic series, which released on [[October 19]], [[2005]]. The issue was written by [[John Ostrander]], and the artwork was penciled by [[Luke Ross]].{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/10-451/Star-Wars-Republic-78|text=STAR WARS: REPUBLIC #78}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Ch'ord Sy'fon}} *[[Republic 78|''Republic'' 78]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Ch'ord Sy'fon |pl=Ch'ord Sy'fon }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Sy'fon, Ch'ord}} [[Category:Bothans]] [[Category:Coruscanti]] [[Category:Males]]
